channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Horse manure slip hazard, 4th April
item.description:
Horse manure in road: 1) slip hazard for cyclists and motorcyclists as rider did not move it to the kerb. 2) in front of driveway so will spread and cause further mess

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heathwood Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Improper repair to road markings, 4th April
item.description:
Two men have been repaniting the road with black paint and yellow spray cans. Unclear why.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Shad Thames, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Batley Place, Hackney, London

item.title: Whole pile of waste outside Brunswick Park on Benhill Road, 4th April
item.description:
Day 1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brunswick Park, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Serious site safety failures – inadequate fencing, exposed hazards, and lack of council oversight., 4th April
item.description:
The site presents clear safety and environmental concerns. Fencing is inadequate and does not properly secure the area, leaving open access points and exposed holes that pose a risk to the public. Materials have been left uncovered, resulting in excessive dust and dirt spreading into the surrounding area. The overall condition of the site suggests poor workmanship and a lack of professional standards. It appears that the works are not being adequately supervised or inspected. Based on the current state, it raises serious concerns that proper checks and enforcement by the council have not been carried out. Given the risks involved, I expect the council to urgently investigate, enforce compliance, and ensure the site is made safe without delay.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A504, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 4th April
item.description:
Two bins full of rubbish and various bags. There are another two bins but don't know if they belong to a resident.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nickelby Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 4th April
item.description:
The dog poo bin on the corner of Englefield crescent bottom of church hill wood has red spray graffiti on the door
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Church Hill Wood, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, sofa, trolley, 4th April
item.description:
Mattress, sofa, trolley left there since beginning of February, this attracts more fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Newacres Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Pigeon in Bin Area, 4th April
item.description:
Bin area of the restaurant I work in has a dead pigeon stuck in the fence. Noticed it this morning, would be great if it could be removed, thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morning Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 4th April
item.description:
The guy at 2A Colleraine road had a Skip and there was rubbish left outside the skip on the road next to it, the skip has now been removed but the rubbish has been left in the road taking up part of a parking bay

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Humber Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light shining into bedroom keeping me awake, 4th April
item.description:
I reported this light shining into my bedroom 5-6 yrs ago. Council put a barrier around light which solved problem. However its fallen off and the light shines into bedroom straight over bed into my eyes at night keeping me awake .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eynswood Drive, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Scumbags, 4th April
item.description:
This is my second report and it still hasn’t been cleared. Please have it done ASAP.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goodwin Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pile of dumped rubbish, 4th April
item.description:
By the Maze Hill bus stop, spilling into the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich

item.title: Temp road signs abandoned, 4th April
item.description:
Two signs on either corner of Maze Hill junction with Trafalgar Rd. Blown over and have been lying there for weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
